description: Configure Stellarium for an educational polar alignment workshop at Mount John Observatory, New Zealand (43.986° S, 170.465° E, 1029 m) on April 15, 2024, at 10:00 UTC. The sky display must have the atmosphere disabled and the Equatorial Grid, Constellation Lines, and Constellation Names/Labels enabled. Capture screenshots centered on Sigma Octantis (Polaris Australis) and Crux (the Southern Cross). Create a reference document at /home/ga/Desktop/scp_alignment_notes.txt containing the workshop location (Mount John), the date (April), and mentions of 'Sigma Octantis' and 'Crux'.
